title: The NSF Merit Review Process and Criteria — D-RED Seminar Slides (Rankins)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2024-03-27 Monthly D-RED Seminar 'The NSF Merit Review Process and Criteria', presented by Claudia Rankins, PhD (PRISSEM Academic Services, LLC). Walks through how NSF panels evaluate proposals against Intellectual Merit and Broader Impacts criteria. Zoom recording: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/RLrxYT9GpQ1V-8JmGWWg2Axh32vfHi-u3Jg2MWW8pUIwnV-G3Rq9xsNGFevaKNpq._4oyptcY6az6C_J7
